Nov 21, 2021 4:50 am

Got few messages past 4 years span Telling me how my words literally saved their lives. I don't have words for y'all. Y'all leave me speechless Thank you for still reading my shit even after me being inactive and act more like my friends than iRL. Recently i was gaslighted by someone close to me, told i got pride in what i do and you're not humble as you show you are, they still hate me for bEING and knowing MYSELF too well, and it's okay, It's OKAY because they are stuck in materialistic lOOP and societal expectations. Because they'll never have what i HAVE, it's not about the money or body count because back of my head there are Few People's hopes and expectations who rely on my words irrespective of what an asshole i AM So if you fuq with my work. I love you all from the bottom of my heart. I still need some time before I come BACK, either iRL or in words idk But i promise you this we gonna be alright ❤️

Conscious Hip Hop & Rap Music, Hip Hop & Rap Music, Urban Contemporary Music

Nov 18, 2021 9:46 am

We broke up like 5 years ago Why are you still so nice to me? I did you so much wrong but yet you talk to me like we're good friends why? Because that's what i am A good pERSON!!! And i'll always bE working on myself Because i know deep down you still regret why we are not together. Sometimes i do too But that doesn't give me right to diss you. YOU'RE the one i loved I was stupid, i'm still naive But that doesn't mean i hate myself. I don't believe in spreading hate and use the sympathy card for attention. I told you if you're going to hate mE, congratulations i love this fandom you created for me with all your fRIENDS who you think are good for yoh and the boys who just want to get in your pants so they'll agree with whatever you throw towards them. because it's not my fault that you never found anyone like me in past 5 years. Khushiya nahi hum toh nafrat mitate -FRAPPEASH

Oct 02, 2021 1:07 am

Yesterday was listening to la haasil aND then hAASIL, just like the aftermath of first dose of covid vACCINE it hit mE. Been so hurt before in life that even a sad song doesn't makes me as eMOTIONAL as 'la haasil' Morning routine: @nerakmusic ❤️ @sunnykhandurrani you a gem to this broken world ❤️ Thank you for this feeling :')))

Oct 02, 2021 1:01 am

It's okay I'm fine!!!

Device ID
android-2b93da0719952ced
Source type
feed_reshare
Has Camera Metadata
Oct 01, 2021 2:48 am

To people who have been thinking i write on real incident YES thank you for understanding that the voices in my head wanted me dead atleast 10 tIMES, *Jumping off the cLIFF *Drug overdose *That terrace with a great view to die Are just too basic The characters that has been mentioned in my posts, it's not someone who EXIST irl. Those are the voices in my head. Writing is my only therapy, the day i stop writing is the day where i'm fully recovered. I don't want to write anymore but i want to know myself better. Re-reading the things i wrote since last october made me realised some crazy shit. EPIPHANY and anxiety at all time hIGH. If i ever hurt you in any way, just remember y'all beautiful whoever i had conversation with. Take care of yourself because nobody WOULD.

Sep 29, 2021 2:09 am

Flex babe ❤️

Device ID
android-2b93da0719952ced
Source type
feed_reshare
Has Camera Metadata
Sep 29, 2021 1:34 am

For the longest time I used to write fiction to prove people which has proven as I have a really chill life. I feel like an imposter of my own life. Instead of living my life, I started imagining things in my head giving my heart and soul to those stories I created. Kiara-sharv is still one the best thing. I'm pretty sure that's fucked up scenario for someone who doesn't look upto writer career as their first income source. I'm doing my masters right now, if I don't find myself now, probably I'll never find myself in this chaos of 7.89 billion people. PS: IF YOU'RE fan of my work(DHH FANS ilu). Check out the link in BIO, you might fall in love with the idea of it #TalkWithInnerVoicr

Sep 14, 2021 4:04 am

Dream asked the last one, Was it worth it? To manipulate the mind by whispering, Dreams are something you cannot achieve, That's why they're dreams. . The worth of an innocent heart at a tender age is unexplainable. Don't lose them even in the utmost of worst times. You have a heart of a child, you will find it, I won't tell you how, or experience, It's a trip of life. ______ Ramen Coffee Nicotine and You_______

Couple of underground artists reached out to me and just playfully asked me if i'd write for one of their song. Aug 16, 2021 6:04 pm

I've been fighting with myself for so LONG that it doesn't feels like a burden anymore. Everyday I'm fighting with my thoughts Somedays I'm losing Somedays i'm winning WITH MYSELF Everyday I'm overthinking overanalyzing things after a J or little buzz, but it worked for me for this far. The hard part is not doing it, the hard part is committing to it every single day! That's when she chuckled and said 'are you tired for the next phase already?'

Jul 16, 2021 1:38 pm

I know I've not being posting things lately, I think I'll stop dumping one concept at one time by posting 10+ posts on same day, I used to write it like an album, I'm proud of two guides I wrote.i can't promise you anything but i can say that I'll be posting more, maybe even bring back interactive story posting or maybe live someday. Somewhere in the search for next concept i kinda forgot how i used to feel like an insta writer.i know I don't have many followers i should not be feeling like that but this page has a special place in heart. It's love! Till then ciao ❤️

Jun 18, 2021 3:56 am

She come up to him Hug him and whispers in EAR 'You're one of the most beautiful soul I've ever MET'. . He dENies by saying there are alot like him out tHERE. . But for him, that's the kINDEST comment he has gOT in a long time. . Butterflies in stomach, looking at her blush, he understood . HE don't want to lose something soo pURE . 'I FEEL BLESSED I FOUND YOU' SHE SAID. . They say this kIND is childish, but that's how we keep the kid iN this cruel world alive.

All these writing pages perching they'll be writing on linkedIn or sOMETHING coz india banning the social media or something Why do you Still need social validation? Why do you have to tell people what you wrote? Have you stopped writing for yourself and writing it for the people? Think about it. It's gonna be harmful for you if not taken care of yourselves. If you are unable to write something which can make you think 5 years from now are you even trying to up your game? Or your iNTENSIONS got blurred?

I don't want to write something which is gonna get decomposed in coming years. They worrying about the reach and engagements Their main worrying is about not losing those numbers They worrying about not being famous in this life, i want to write something which will live in hERE Never been a fan of getting famous never will. I want to reach mASSES Just not today A timeless classic WHICH WILL RESONATE even 100 years from nOW Don't get it confused with ego This is Self cONFIDENCe!

One of the most heartbreaking thing I've done is watched the entire season of BH the day it was released without contemplating with the WRITING, inside jokes and their witty humour. It's always great to go back and watch the show again. If you love raunchy comedy and shows which can make your brain go 180° This is show is fOR you ❤️

It's a good thing if you're not doing good Atleast you know where you're standing out. And that's a beautiful feeling. I don't do such 'i hope you feel better' coz you will find yourself one someday if you keep struggling and keep questioning yourself. You're doing great homie ❤️

Mar 17, 2021 7:52 pm

I held her hand firmly and she looked at me and gave me a kiss on my cheeks. She knows She knows that I don't need love right now, I just need to be accepted for my fears, she knows I'm scared to take the next step, she grabbed my hand calmly and for the first time she saw how the dilation of eyes concept is not myth. she loves him but she wants him to grow and know first that she is there. She asked him a general questions, He was not ready for a concerning tone

I was reading this and it reminded me I haven't posted parts before this ONE, Till yesterday I forgot I have to upload a post. I was busy living my life instead of penning them down. When I finished writing this story, I saw a change in myself, had to go through alot of overthinking nights and introspecting days. Abhi toh bohot aage jaana hai, it's all about perspective babyyyy ❤️ Phase-3

I remember scribbling this before writing my first guide. It suddenly became a dedicated project, I was surrounded by thoughts I was never before, and the things I wrote in that day was one of my most favourite work of all time. After writing that piece I never look back. That was my breakthrough to the next level!

Feb 22, 2021 1:48 pm

PERFORMED THIS PIECE Almost 6 months ago, The audience hated it, I NEVER TOLD THEM ABOUT THE REFERENCES LIKE being BOLD, 84 kEYS, why we love being behind the keyboard. THIS WAS PROBABLY THE FIRST TIME WHEN I WAS IN LOVE WITH LITERATURE, NOT MUCH COMPLEX WORDS OR 'POETRY GRAMMAR' JUST A SILLY LOVE LETTER WHICH I'M KINDA PROUD OF ❣️

Feb 17, 2021 11:56 pm

I'll promise you forever and eventually those things will be considered as resentment towards me. Let's live in the moment and instead of saying, let's do those things. Loving each other is the best thing we can do for us Love yourself enough to let the S/o love yOU more. If you can't love yourself Don't expect to be loved You're not searching for a replication of the teen show you saw If you ever feel low, just remember how much of a big fan I am of yours. You can always come to me to rant,talk,cry,or coffee. I'm a simp,but only for you and nobody else.👉👈

Feb 08, 2021 1:32 am

there's a girl that i like but she is not into me She acknowledge and replies me back with same intensity But I know it's never going to happen again anytime soon since the last person i loved put a shotgun in my head and blew my brains out. maybe loving someone is not cup of my tea But then again whenever i see a couple holding hands, pulling legs, making blush each other i want to have similar relationship with that girl But she does that with everyone, she dont need a heart, she just need a shoulder! She dont need your care, she needs a partner in crime. She dont need an ATM she needs someone to share expenses in expensive restaurants. She is a firefly, she is meant to be free ❤️ -Sharvilak

Feb 04, 2021 6:57 am

Keep reading your old work, Know your roots, update your list with the strength and weakness you have, what you have overcomed them over a period of time. In the end it's only you vs you If you can't top your past work, take some time for yourself, absorb the teachings then head start to the next challenges You can do anything you set your mind to If you still can't beat the old you, Maybe that's a dead end. Just don't ruin your legacy just to stay relevant. Just be true to yourself and love something so much that it makes you happy, it inspires you for the next day. Scribbled 10 writeups in past three days.

I'M GLAD TO SEE MYSELF STILL NOT LOSING HOPE IN WRITING I'M GLAD TO SEE MYSELF STILL NOT HOPING A THIRD PERSPECTIVE TO SET MY MOOD I'M GLAD TO SEE ME FOLLOWING 'ME VS ME' RELIGIOUSLY Thanks to the people who read my shit and shout at me for 3 hours Thankyou :') THE YEAR 2020 WAS A EMOTION OF ROLLER COASTER FOR MANY OF US. Has Camera Metadata
Dec 17, 2020 11:11 pm

Whoever comes after us, tell them that we are not fucked up generation. We were full of hopes and dreams once, but because of the greed to become famous, Power to be heard and how feelings are manipulated by keeping opinions matters, we kind of lost ourselves somewhere. And that’s where the mask became so absorbent that it has now became our identity. We are just mocking someone else for small pleasures of our life. FIND YOURSELF!! DON'T LIVE IN ILLUSION!!! My fav part while writing this freestyle

Nov 26, 2020 12:51 pm

Ironically i don't read much but i listen to songs. One of my fav genre is rap and rock. Best part about them is that you find one specific line that one specific message which was written but you get to know it when you listen to it. I've only read handful of books, i'm more of a podcast/conversation kinda gUy. Talk to me about stuff which inspires you, blows your you not the story which doesn't have any outcome in real life. I guess I greedy when it comes to golden conversation. Medicate nahi mere dost mediate kar.

Has Camera Metadata
Nov 26, 2020 5:38 am

According to me? Achieve goals and search something to live for in life. Love yourself, be kind to people, stay loyal(coz it's rare these days), humble dOWn. bt mat do logo ko, talk about ideas and philosophy instead of talking about the day (unless it's a good/bad story and you want to share coz you love bragging xD). Keep yourself productive with reading about something, STAY FOCUS on your health (physically and mentally) And most importantly find yourself,FIND YOUR VIBE AND don't worry if people don't agree with your views, stop looking for validation when all you need is to satisfy yourself. It's you vs you Not you vs the world. Our fav movie reference->

Hip Hop & Rap Music, Urban Contemporary Music

Life is going great. Couldn't be more thankful for what's up! Never felt so good about myself and all my alter egos are also in peace Sometimes in morning wHILe having my coffee i think about the things i did in past and for that i feel good. It's been a roller coaster ride for me these past few months. Thankyou for asking. Answering here coz you don't have much time to have a talk. Give me call sometime? We got alot to catch mY man ❤️ J cole for heart🧠 Kendrick for mind ❤️

"Hum har gaye lekin Tujhe jeetne waale ko mool tera pata ho Has jaise tera janamsidh adhikar ho DEWAAR ke us paar se Tujhe dur se DEKHKR hi khush huun Aaiyo na kabhi vapis is baar mei tere liye tuch huun" THIS IS A BREAKUP LETTER FOR A TOXIC PLACE FOR ME. THERE HAS BEEN ONLY FEW PEOPLE FOR WHOM I'VE POSTED STUFF AND STILL HERE. IT HAS NOTHING TO DO WITH MY PREVIOUS RELATIONSHIPS. MY PREVIOUS RELATIONSHIPS WERE AMAZINGLY BEAUTIFUL. I feel good that i grew up from that phase and moving on :'))) NOTHING MORE THAN THAT. PLEASE DON'T TAKE THIS THE WRONG WAY AND FORM YOUR OPINION JUST BECAUSE SOME OF YOU ARE JUST HERE FOR THE GOSSIP. #BIGBOSS

Nov 01, 2020 2:05 pm
Has Camera Metadata
Nov 01, 2020 5:58 am

I love the fact how people around me are using this image and manipulating their audience into like comment share or even save their post so that others can also see. Isn't it similar to when you've lost hope in your art you just need a validation that you can write. HECk i don't care about the numbers anymore. If i want to i could've sent my posts to big pages. I know i need alot of improvement in my storytelling but i know one thing for sure that begging for validation is not one of them. Funny thing is half of them don't believe in their art and will leave writing (including me) because they're here to be heard and not because they love what they write. Have faith in your art; embrace it like you mean it; keep evolving, don't stop!

Has Camera Metadata
Oct 30, 2020 10:04 pm
Has Camera Metadata
Oct 29, 2020 6:25 pm

I see interview of people who are instagram writes, call themselves writers, GIVES me a boost that i don't belong here. People who claim to save lives and constantly saying they write to save someone or something; are the same who are stuck in the same loop, talking about same thing over and over again. Like their life revolves around NEGATIVITIES. They've normalised DEPRESSION, suicide and even rape in their writings. That's messed up. Instead of ranting it on social media think about it, maybe you need therapy and not approval from your peers writing on the same thing. :/ I don't have many followers; i'm glad it's like that; i just want my core audience to be there;who can criticise my work and be brutally honest. if an artist explains his reason like doing it for the betterment or something, are still stuck in that loop of the corporate mindset. Why would you do something for the third person when you are not happy doing that THING? Think about it. :) Ps:this has nothing to do with @profound.artists interviews. They're okay. I don't read them much to make a statement on them. Anyway congratulations everyone who has reached at that level of giving interview.

Has Camera Metadata
Oct 21, 2020 10:51 am

It's funny how sometimes when you talk about your ex-friend/lover, all you do is say how bad they are etc. etc. But if they've never made you felt good about yourself why were you with them in first place? And if they're toxic and you know that then why were you eNJOYINg the bond in first place? 😂 More mind numbing and spirit crushing IS how people portray love in social media; by posting about it and constantly shoving stories of how non-human my love interest is (they're perfect,i can't believe they're with me etc etc) And when you don't do such things as shown in the movies/shows (like bribe them with GIFts) they think you're not perfect. Like love is a set of rules and you want to become toby. Welcome to corporate thinking :/ Had this talk on the same thing 3 years ago! There should be some things which should be left for your own and nobody comes and tell you what to do in that area.

I call myself an artist Not because I've crossed some milestones in my life but aren't we all artist of our own lives? Some show it with design, some write, some compose music, some create. Some solve the problems. We are one of them. (Should i put a copyright by ©Sharvilak_writes here xd) We should be proud of ourselves for doing something which keeps us motivated to do more while walking the same path. Create canvas of your life, introspect it with words, romanticize your way of living do mistakes, learn from it and most importantly live like there is no tomorrow. This is your playground Play wisely

This one line is more than just a simple text. I was diagnosed with covid-19 when there were cases around 15lakhs. And also at that time i was not scared of death, i was scared of something else. Kudos to the people who understood this line. And thankyou for reading it carefully.. There's more than 5 references only in this post. This one is my fav. Now if you're reading this and thinking to call me and ask me how i'm doing Please don't. :) Maybe i don't deserve you. (Not being egoistic, but you never saw me as a friend in first place to support my writing in first place :)

I just wish that I could travel time To understand what I have in mind One day at a time As a kid I was happy go lucky Now my imaginary friends don’t trust me Tryna find the meaning of a home Surrounded by my family but I'm feeling alone Sitting in my room, staring at the walls I'm afraid of heights but I'm not afraid to fall Feeling like a scapegoat to my own demons Quick to give advice but I dont stop my own bleeding I guess I need a break from these ways -Ayusha Dhir (@fatalsworld)

Has Camera Metadata
Sep 01, 2020 7:34 am

IN A WAY I RESPECT HIS DECISION BECAUSE I AM STILL GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING. I DON'T GET APPRECIATION TO THE THINGS I'VE WRITTEN IN PAST 2 YEARS. EVEN KNOW I HAVE LEARNT ALOT BUT EVEN IF THERE ARE 400 PEOPLE FOLLOWING ME IT'S LIKE I'M JUST WRITING VARIETIES AND NOT IMPROVING BECAUSE THERE'S SCARCITY OF PEOPLE WHO READS AND GIVES ANY KIND OF CRITICISM IN MY STUFF. MAYBE IT'S THE DOPAMINE KICK WHICH I USED TO GET BEFORE BUT NOW IT FEELS LIKE EVERYONE HERE IS TO JUST JUDGE ME or my character EVEN FOR WRITING A FICTIONAL PIECE. Which is great because if i can maintain my personal persona and this one and keep them apart from each other. it makes me feel i've reached a place where i always wanted to be. So thank you for treating me like that. Like i said in my last blog i don't feel like writing. Here's a fun fact: My last 6 posts were uploaded the same night. At this point it's not about the engagement or reach for me it's not about number of followers, i will still do my rituals (random lIVEs and polls and shit) It's been all about my art for past few months and i think i'll respect that. I won't quit writing just like that, i might not post that often

Music genre
Hip Hop & Rap Music, Urban Contemporary Music
Has Camera Metadata
Sep 01, 2020 7:06 am

I WAS BINGING LOGIC FOR PAST TWO DAYS AND ALSO HEARD HIS LAST ALBUM (THIS IS NOT AN ALBUM REVIEW) NO PRESSURE IS SUPPOSED TO BE LOGIC'S LAST ALBUM. BECAUSE AS HE SAID HE'S GOING TO GIVE MORE TIME TO FAMILY SINCE HE just became a dad. Songs like confession of a dangerous mind talks alot about how negative comments on his songs has affected him mentally and how he was being compared to kendrick has took a toll on him back in 14/15 HE WAS STRUGGLING THROUGH RANDOM FEEDBACKS COMING FROM PEOPLE. LOGIC IS ONE OF THE GREAT RAPPERS OF THIS GENERATION IN A WAY HIS RETIREMENT MAKE SENSE HE JUST WANT TO CUT THE TIES WITH THE NEGATIVES OF SOCIAL MEDIA. (1/2)

Aug 31, 2020 6:34 am

Me: i chill listening to green day Friend 1: green day is shit now Me: That's your opinion, I vibe with them. Friend 2: yeah I gotta agree it's became cancerous Friend 1: Finally someone said it. Me inside: can I go now? Hashtag HERES what's wrong xD I don't want to compare stuff, i'm just a person with different moozik taste different people have different tAste. Why can't some people accept that there are people with different opinions and views. They vibe on BTS or some other shit, why is that a matter to others? They can accept bisexuality but not a person who listens to lil pump or EMIWAY or one direction (ugh cringe much?) Kaisa hypocrisy bro? The problem is not that friend of mine, dil ke TUKDe hai wo bKL par some things like these which forced him to shut doors to good music. I'd listen to bTS, only thing is idk anyone who vibes with thode songs. Conversation with 2 people 6/N 3

WO KEHTE HAI KI LIKHAYI MEI TAKAT HAI. PAR KYU SIRF BURAYI DIKHTI HAI JAB KOI KALAM UTHATA HAI LIKHNE KE LIYE? KYUN YEA DEPRESSION,SUICIDE,RAPE KE WRITINGS DEKHKR ITNA SHOCKING NAHI LAGTA ABHI? KYA YEA SAB NORMAL HOGYA HAI HUMARE DIMAG MEIN KI ABHI ITNA BAD FEEL NAHI HOTA YEA PADHKR? JAB KISI SE BAAT HOTI HAI TOH KYU WO SIRF APNA DUKH SHARE KARTE HAI PAR JAB INTERNET PR SOCIAL IMAGE FORM KARNE KI BAAT AATI HAI TOH YEA NEGATIVITY GAYAB HO JAATA HAI. AISA KYUN HOTA HAI? EVER NOTICED EVERY WRITER HAS ATLEAST 2 ACCOUNTS. ONE PERSONAL AND ONE ONLY FOR WRITEUPS EVER WONDERED WHY? BECAUSE MAYBE WE'RE SCARED OF GETTING JUDGED BY PEOPLE WHO KNOWS US PERSONALLY :/ MY PERSONAL ACCOUNT: @lifeofhimanshoe

Has Camera Metadata
Aug 01, 2020 8:30 am

People privileged to get their beauty sleep. On the other hand there are people who are not being able to sleep because they're suffering from anxiety and insecurities. Be proud of what you have Find a way to turn your flaws into strength. That's what makes you sTRONGER and smarter in your skills. Meanwhile some people are still taking power naps because they don't have any other option. If it's something new, don't worry even you were noob when you were learning to walk. Don't be afraid of failures, The more you learn from those The more you move forward. It's not about the quantity of tries, But the quality changed in limited number of tries. Fin. Example:IF you fail in the same exam every 4th month with the same technique. THEN ask yourself, Is it the greed of validation you want or jealousy from peers pressure?

Has Camera Metadata
Jul 30, 2020 9:28 am

A question to all the artists our there. Yes you all do write amazing you should be proud of what makes a third person feel like home in your scribbles. That's like the best thing that could happen to an artist, appreciation. But do you find yourself rushing in that place again and again, when you want to produce it? And why are there only 2-3 type of content? Is that how you want to define yourself to everyone? Like I used to write romantic stuff, I'm not the romantic type irl. People write about trauma and be stuck in the loop and then have identity crisis. I understand the struggle to be on top of your game, but ask yourself, Are you doing it for the art or your intensions got blurred?

Jul 16, 2020 8:54 am

Fun fact about my logo which you can see at the header of your tab when you open my website I was inspired by this character in Death Note on how he uses observation and deduction to come to conclusion of anything. That was another reason why Death Note has been special to me, because I learnt about observational writing from there. Which became a big thing for my blogs 3 years ago. There are still times where I play sountracks of the show. So inspiring ❤️ It's L from Death Note btw xD Also THAT'S where i started giving more work on attention to details

Has Camera Metadata
Jul 13, 2020 4:53 am

THE YOUTH OF THIS COUNTRY IS EASY TO BE MANIPULATEd BY EITHER SPREADING HATE(HINDUSTANI BHAU) OR BY PLAYING VICTIM CARD(CARRYMINATI) OR BY SPREADING FORCED POSITIVITY (MUMBAIKAR NIKHIL). BE AWARE OF EVERYTHING HAPPENING AROUND AND DON'T GET MANIPULATED EASILY. Look out for toxic traits, red fLAGs and what they want to convey in the video. They get fame when people react and then they make video in response (just like what diss is in rap game) (emiway vs raftaar yaad haina? XD) They sometimes GO below the belt to pROVE their point. Sometimes they takedown video if they don't like (shoutout to lakshay bhaiyaa and ht mobiles xD) Even if you reply and think this will end it they'll come and bITE you again. (Like muhfaad diss on raftaar one month after the beef ended) The problem is the engagement one gets in the post, the like, comments and share people do that's what make them work more in that direction. It's on people like us what type of content we want them to focus on. The effin dopamine dosage one gets for the social validation for being woke etc etc. (3/n) Demographics of people watching these above mentioned names are 12-28

Has Camera Metadata
Jul 13, 2020 4:43 am

THE ROOT OF THE PROBLEM IS ALSO NOT MEME PAGES FOR FORCING THEIR OPINION ON PEOPLE LIKE THAT. IT'S THE WAY WE HAVE BEEN RAISED. IF YOU LOOK AT THE DEBATES IN OTHER COUNTRIES AND DEBATES IN OUR COUNTRY. YOU WILL KNOW HOW MUCH WE HAVE DEGRADED THE VALUE OF THAT WORD. The root of the problem is how it affects people and how they react to it. People are volatile and need such reactions that's why a show business is much appreciated than a good deed. People like arnab goswami who was once pioneer of modern indian journalism is now being called as entertainer? PEOPLE like hindustani bhau who started their digital career by calling out various people and giving them hateful speech It's funny how people take the easy way to buy tHat lifestyle and badass shubham is one of the prime example of it. By spreading hate speech and degrading the opponent. It's not the first time, 2013 me bhi kisine promise kiya tha petrol 30 ka hoga ya opponent team ki galti hai sab hum sudhaar la rahe hai. (2/n)

Has Camera Metadata
Jul 13, 2020 4:29 am

Have you seen how meme pages have became our news source? These days? I don't have problem with they posting news and other stuff so people read it. It's actually a good thing for people who are addicted to the social media platform. Instead of reading newspaper, people prefer apps like inshorts where they can understand the situation in 60 words (i use inshorts for the same) Problem arises when meme pages keep their opinions and spread clout towards one specific thing. YouTube vs tik-tok was once a big thing And then carryminati situation happened And how meme pages started supporting him, spreading hate by telling their followers to go to playstore and give them 1 ⭐ not because of the recent animal brutality which caused tik tok ban in india for a week but they took down carry papa's video because he was using 2010 HUMOUR in 2020 (calling them chakka, beti and what not) (1/n) Not sponsered xD 400 followers wale ko kaun sponser de skta hai xD

Nominated by @themousypoet This challenge is post the best work which is close to your heart (don't go for most likes, let them read the piece you read) and nominate other artists to do the same This one is really close to my heart because of all the transfers happening in my life. And that place was the longest i've spent at one place. Wrote this while spending the last moments in the same house have changed 11 houses (10 cities of india) in 23 years THAT PLACE HAD MY HEART. I nominate @anjali_scribed @flowerhead.rashi @saaniya30 @bhuvvii_writes @crudesko

Has Camera Metadata
Jul 08, 2020 6:47 am

I revisited my recent blog posts All the nine chapters which i wrote And found something unexpected There has always been a debate of serialization vs episodic and i found myself going through the same Selirlazation is where you connect one dot in chapter 1 to chapter 6 and surprised people with a throwback scene or something Episodic is where you complete the whole thing in one chapter but the characters remains the same and the story is different In the kiara sharv part (which i wrote 2 years ago) Is serialized The recent 9 cHAPTErs are both serialized and ePISODIC You don't need to read the previous chapters to get what's the character arc or where the story is moving Example of ePISODIC shows: the simpsons, southpark Example of serialized shows: Bojack Horseman, breaking bad This Blew my mind 🤯 Always been a fan of screenwriting but never THOUGHt aBOUT using it Till i found out i've already done it already LINK in bio if anyone interested in reading

Thankyou everyone who has read my recent post. It was tough for me to post this on a social media because even i've experienced a similar type of situation in past. While i was writing this i wrote my experience too but it became a bit personal so had to that part. I was unsure if people would like such type of content I didn't have knowledge about using trigger warning before the start but idk if it would be worth it Thanks for all the support The likes, comments and share are overwhelming Thank-you so much If it wasn't for this song and a little bit of introspection in past i wouldn't have written this piece in first place. If you haven't read it please give it a read and listen to this beautiful song. Song name: Pankh- Seedhe Maut ft. Bawri basanti In other news We're close to reach 400 Should i do live after touching 400?🙌

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 27, 2020 12:06 am

New post is up Link in bio It took me around 6 months and 8 blogs to finish what I've started This story was on development since last October when I was fed up of questions like agla sharv-kiara wala kab aayega? I wrote envelope 5/5 and wrote this story too. Listening to 100+ songs Every day exploring new artist Watched around 10+ new shows, started watching anime Taking inspiration from them their writing style, struggle, hustle, screenplay and interpretation. Reading different articles from from psychology to philosophy to history it was fun to write, each and every paragraph in this storyline has another meaning if interpret (This was something I was inspired by alphabet slaughter rap) This story felt more like moving on from the sharv-kiara sphere I was in for almost 2 years. That's when I decided to write a completely new story.

Jun 23, 2020 1:30 am

'Your raps are like Gujarat They got no bars' Bar in rap music is spitting a line in 4 beats of that music. He's calling out the new commers in indian rap that they don't have bars. If there was no racial discrimination towards the people in South or NE we'd have got much talent yahi hai chiz jo lekhak kehena chahte hai 'You got no struggle no scars' For the people who got signed in gully boy and now are big names. Fun fact:This guy have a song featured in SRK movie in 2012

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 23, 2020 1:24 am

'Monday ki choto ko bhi kabhi mangal hona hi hai' Wordplay on Monday ke baad aata hai mangal and Reference to things will heal overtime. 'Bandiya mujhe sunti hai thoda jaldi so jaati hai Kyunki sapno me aane me Freddy Krueger se mahir hai' Freddy Krueger is a fictional character who kill his victims in their dreams which causes death in real life. Encore comparing himself with Kruger's talent. To understand that reference you have to listen to the song Song:Meri Baggi by SeedheMaut

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 22, 2020 10:30 pm

This was a diss to another lekhakh Gaurav Pal By lekhak Kr$na Krsna bhaiya calls him Gauri (coz why not call them girl, such a boomer Humour xD) And word play on 'nasha ruk nahi payega' sounds more like na sha-rukh (this is a namecall on emiway buntai xD who's real name is Shahrukh Shaikh) 'Banaya maine jaake Ra.One ko Ramayana Teri paheli ka anjaam maar khayega' Ra.One Paheli and Anjaam were flops of srk. Banaya maine ra.One ko ramayana' is reference to the diss song by Gaurav named 'Happy Diwala Raavan' calling himself Raavan Song: Makasam by KR$NA I

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 22, 2020 6:12 pm

Before decoding these lines This song is 7 years old Idhar lekhak/Legend Brodha V kehte hai 'life is an octopus trying to chole you with tentacles' Kanaloa is a god symbolized by the squid or by the octopus, and is typically associated with Kāne. 'Survive by only those who prove to be sensible' Kanaloa is also considered to be the god of the Underworld and a teacher of magic. Legends state that he became the leader of the first group of spirits "spit out" by the gods. How he is in underground and wanted to be the sensible' one 'With only two choices good and bad, hardest part is choosing the path' He talks about how achieving heights with evil deeds are easy than struggling and reach at that mark. How do you want to remembered as? The best in game or best in fame? Song name: Aathma Rama Hum chutiye jaise Mumbai-Delhi karte rahe par baazi maari Bangalore ne 😂

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 22, 2020 5:13 pm

Idhar lekhak/Lyrical Murderer krsna kehna chahte hai 'naram hai Guloti jaise lucknow me hoye' referencing on how the other beef he had has no hard hitting effect on him or his career. 'Chain nahi milta tu itna kyu rota hai suna teri jaat ka hota hi chota hai' is a very controversial line if taken out of context, but in this he is talking about the beef he has with Chen K and a word play on China and chen K First it was corona (allegady) And then now Indo-China war Btw this song is around 4 months old. 'YS $ combined hai Columbine' Is reference to Columbine High school massacre in 1999 Also for YS-Young stunners and $-Kr$na 'Befizul ungli karte jaise NOTA hai' Is reference to how the NOTA button in indian election is basically not worth voting for. Aani toh do/teen me se hi koi powerful party hai Song name: Quarantine by YS and krsna See in video krsna sitting in Chinese restaurant and stabbing momos Video me bhi diss kar rahe xD

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 22, 2020 4:53 pm

Idhar lekhak vivek kehna chahte hai ki aajkal ke desi hip hop scenes itne commerical hogye hai ki log bhul jaa rahe hai rap is supposed to send a message and #machayenge types songs are getting the tag as hip-hop songs. Drake on the other hand is a commerical artist and make songs which can he played in clubs and all. Kendrick on the other hand makes technical rap music. He's the OG of the decade. Thus the lines 'Can Drake do what Kendrick do' Amazing wordplay ❤️ Very underrated song Song: Raastafari by Epr and karma

Has Camera Metadata
Jun 22, 2020 4:33 pm

I've always been a fan of rap music. At first just like every other indian I was just a fan of eminem xD And then as time passes I heard many artists like J Cole Kendrick Kanye logic NF Yelawolf and many others Then in 2015 I heard some underground hip hop songs and I was surprised to see they're trying in 2016/7 they decided to make a bollywood movie on underground rap In past few years the growth in rap industry in India was huge with some complex lines, metaphors and references. And special thanks to @rohancariappa sir for explaining complex rap music to a larger audience #SastaRohanCariappa I might pull out few of my favourite rap references in my next stories. There are very few songs in desi hip hop which are one of it's kind. This is one of them

Some albums which makes you flow with the emotions of songs Some albums which resonates with your inner self Some albums which makes you realise Some Albums makes you connect with the protagonist in a different emotional level Some albums which you want to listen on loop and don't want anyone to judge you for your choices They are your guilty pleasures. For me personally there more than one album Albums which helped me alot. I'll drop some of my favourites which comes top of my mind My list:(not in chronological order) 1. Hybrid theory 2. Meteora 3. The Slim Shady LP 4.Revival 5.One more Light 6. Revolution Radio 7.American Idiot 8. The Beautiful Letdown

Jun 20, 2020 9:55 pm

Isn't it ironic when the most common thing in the topics that are trending are wHO TO blame and not finding the apt solution for it? From Political aND RELIGIOUS views to which platform is cringe and which is cool to use Or why is nepotism bad Being a part of controversy has become bEING relevant these days and a way to each out masses by either being in support or against (by looking where the crowd is affinitied) What kind of social validation is this when the outcome is always they are wrong and i'm right? But not telling why there is so much hatred in first place Behti Ganga me tum bhi haath dho lo *FARMERS were/are dying *ECONOMY CURVE IS FLATTENING *RACISM AGAINST NORTH EASTERN/SOUTH INDIANS STILL EXIST *CYBERBULLYING IS STILL HAPPENING *TEMPLES, MOSQUE etc HAVE Plenty of money but still not touched in global pandemic. But let's play a blame game Blame the other religion,BLAME the other person, blame the previous/current GOVERNMENt. Make a socio-political statement but most importantly blame others for not being they way they want us. (It's like buying a clothes from zara and expecting life-time warranty on that) If you don't accept with someone's views Know your DEMOCRACTIC right that you still have freedom to keep your opinion. Blame bollywood Blame china Let's call it china virus instead of coronavirus

Jun 10, 2020 5:09 am

Should I stop putting random Q and A and polls and shit? It's been almost 4 months and various QnA I've done with barely one or zero response I just want to connect with people who like or appreciate my art and I want to know more how I can improve more, it's all about the improvement and changes that I feel to be looking forward to. I share random stories of myself here just to make you comfortable and we can talk about stuffs, let it be any topic. I've been called a content whore by my friends because I listen to their stories and by thinking from their perspective and write it down to add characters in my storyline (and that's a lie xD)(Shoutout to "Wish you were here" ,written on May '20) I take most of my inspiration from music, games, movies and tv shows. #rant

Has Camera Metadata
May 30, 2020 3:21 am

Humans are socialising being they can't survive without having any human interaction at all Right from the history till now the only difference between us and other organisms are we have cognitive sense to stick together like a community. Sometimes people convey they're are happy to meet you. But do meeting people makes you happy, or is it the quality of time we don't spend it with ourselves? Was it the solo trip or trip with friends/family or bonding with people? Was it completing that book or finishing that game/series

Has Camera Metadata
May 27, 2020 2:46 am

It was 2010 I was gifted a Nokia 2690 (dad's old phone) And the internal memory was 15mb had to fit one song coz having ocd for downloading only 320kbps song xD It was either New divide by LP it American idiot by Green Day. Despite being a big fan of green day I decided to go for LP. I still remember listening to that song on loop till I saved enough money for memory card. First time I heard linkin park was in 2002 My brother was genius enough to manage to put songs in radio of GTA vice City xD That was the first time I heard hybrid theory and many other great albums. Explaining the previous story and pouring my thoughts as I was thinking about Chester Later in around 2006/7 When I learnt myself how to use internet and how to download songs I started making a list of songs I need to download, because I never knew I was an audiophile till someone told me such term exist xD I used to download songs wot bitrate 320kbps I never claimed to be a hardcore fan of LP but his music was something I could relate to. Thanks for the vocals we need the most at that time Chester ❤️ Coz lp song was new xD PS: here's a fun fact My close friends call me Tester like it's their way to give tribute to Chester plus I was sad that day I feel honoured to be called that 🙈

I remember I was going through a rough phase (still am xD) but at that time it was this guy who was singing and giving me hope!Battle symphony was on loop for many days before everything. Today heard those songs after many days Thank-you for being there Chester ❤️

May 09, 2020 5:20 am

Maturity would be listening to both side of argument without judgement and deciding to go with neither coz you're tired of choosing sides and just want to live your life without having to discriminate between things which are basically useless if you remove them from your life. Why do we have to copy someone's ideology or lifestyle and make them as ours? Is it necessary to do that thing everyone is doing? Maybe not, then why so mUCH pRESSURE? To quote Kurt Cobain Well, whatever ,nevermind. BUT THEN AGAIN WHO AM I? JUST ANOTHER PERSON LIKE YOU AND I Why can't we just agree to disagree? Why can we just respect different opinions? Maybe we're too blinded to prove everyone wrong that we forget how it's like to be lose an argument And don't want to quit till they say we're right

Has Camera Metadata
Apr 16, 2020 3:31 am

Yes I do like poetry/shayri But I'd rather support local raw talent and appreciate them instead of pages like yours who begs for follower counts it breaks my heart. We look at big pages like yours as role models but now I wonder are you really a fan of writing Or just addicted to the likes and comments you get? talent doesn't require follower count or number of likes only time will tell. If you're true to your work then other aspects like greed and social pressure don't even matter. Please stop begging/suggesting (because my vocabulary is weak) to like your page. If they really like your work they will follow you. A page of follower strength 340 is begging you to please stop this and focus on your writing.Thankyou for spending some time in my story and asking me question. It's really a thinker, if I'm doing it for acceptance from people or I really love writing. If I were you I'd rather focus on my writings than on my followers count Thankyou again for asking me to follow you Peace ✌️ Read my last post to know what exactly I'm talking about (link in bio) #FreeKiPublicity xD

Has Camera Metadata
Dec 18, 2019 5:51 pm
Has Camera Metadata
Dec 17, 2019 1:37 am

It's been more than 40,000 hours since i wrote my first masterpiece which made me believe that i can express my emotions IN writing. Let it be for self or my characters 40,000 hours ago i never thought I'd be this proud of my little hobby thing i started it as something i did for fun I'm glad some months later i decided to make this ig account and get people to read all my work in 1 pLACe I'm thankful for everyone who supported me at my worst and whenever i have had a mental block. You people are gems! Travelled to many places wrote pieces in many different situations Just because i loved doing it for myself. I was writing for myself and i was happy with all the likes All the suggestions given by people including my ex I love you all❤️ Special thanks to those people who used to tease me calling me writer sharvilak or yea to book chapega. Well book ka toh pata nahi Par dimag abhi vaisa chalne laga hai. Thankyou so much

Dec 12, 2019 3:36 am

First kashmir me internet ka situation, Now in Assam. Apart from this Bookings jo online hota tha wo hone se raha And then people say we don't eat onion so we don't care. Ek kaam karo na internet hi band krvado. China hi bana do na isko Banning cartoons because PM jaisa dikhta hai main protagonist. This country got what it deserves. This government we have is because of what the nation elected them to rule. CONGRATULATIONS EVERYONE WHO VOTED FOR THIS BIG BOSS LEVEL DRAMA Badti economy aur unemployment rate. While country main leaders are Still confused between GDP 5% karni thi ya 5 trillion dollars economy banani hai

Isn't it beautiful when people become home? with their arms your walls and heart like your own. A heart like your own they have which beats entirely for you, oh, isn't it beautiful when you love them and they love you too? Their heart sings melodies the voice mellifluous to your ears, oh, isn't it beautiful when they sing a song no one but you can hear? -Anonymous @enchanting.poetry

Oct 12, 2019 9:35 am

New blog post and stories may come soon in couple of weeks or maybe a month. I'm still taking this time off. I took the time off because of my mental health and by writing the similar set of thing again and again not giving me enough creativity to do things. Till that time stay tuned Here's are some of the cringy stuff I wrote in past 3years.

Has Camera Metadata
Oct 12, 2019 9:32 am

The only reason why there was nothing after envelope 4 is because i wanted to work on a different story. As a creator of my small fantasy world i felt like there are only 2 our of 5 main characters who got more limelight than the others. Apart from this. I was growing up and wanted to try my hands on different genres of story writing. I've been highly inspired by how some of the cult classic have been written and portrayed in the book as well as in the movies. There might be couple of stories of Sharvilak and Kiara in future. But i can't promise you how many I wanted to work on a different story telling style too. It might suck at the beginning but i want to try something new. Another reason why the change in the genre was important for me because All these stories somehow ends up being me according to my friends and family. Which is not true. I've been writing fiction since day 01. I hope you all understand. I'm a storyteller and this is the only truth in my entire life.

There's something about you which still makes me blush at 4am in the morning, Just moment's before i sleep. They way you look at me Wearing my favourite hoodie With those puppy eyes Just expecting a warm tight hug. God i miss wrapping my arms around and Hold you while caressing your hair and Look into those bewitching eyes And just stare at them till one of us melts And kiss the other one either on cheek or forehead And say those three magical words.

Mar 31, 2019 2:38 am

*Write what you feel like *Start making rough notes of your observations/ideas *Start revising the scribbled words from rough note *Carve your idea in the form of either poem/musing/writeup/Short-story etc. *Search Google for appropriate word selection *Learn to adapt to connect it to imagination and let the situation play in your mind. *Don't let other steal your write-ups...they can steal your quote but not the beautiful brain which worked to get it big. *find friends of same interest and share your drafts with them,learn their type of writings and adapt whatever you feel best is Keep your eyes and ears open What if they couldn't see what is obvious to you?

Oct 26, 2018 9:33 pm

Kaafi negativity bruh.. Lemme answer this that way You're breathing, which means you are alive, which mean the air you breathe is keeping you alive You're eating, which means you are doing something.. So hunger inspires you to eat Living makes you breathe And basically you're keeping it going! You're answering this question with a hope That you'll get inspired to do something, let it be big or small You are elevating your game daily a little, and that's what matter Stop bitching about small things and look at the Big Picture, look at yourself, Is your 8 year old self happy when he looks at today's you?

My top pics for motivation(artists) are 1. Eminem 2.Switchfoot 3. The Script 4. Green Day 5. Jake Hill And the list continues Shows/youtubers which motivates me. 1. @thenerdwriter 2.@pewdiepie (who thought he would still be #1) +@jacksepticeye(journey from 2.7k subs to 20m) 3.@bojackhorseman 4. @southpark + @familyguyfox (coz who doesn't likes little satire) 5. @blackmirrorseries Funny thing I get motivated by things i couldn't do I still crave to write satire like southpark and family guy Depression like bojack horseman and Louis CK A 10 minute entertaining video keeping audience excited without using cheap shots like' later in this video' Or Rap 😜 Getting motivated by Content creators themselves.

Sep 17, 2018 1:37 pm

I still remember those days when I Used To write even in Notepad Because at that point all i wanted was to write But then people started to raise issues in my post about grammar and how short your stories are and how your story is not upto The par So i started using other apps like word/libre etc. Now at this point i am helpless without these apps because somewhere in writing i grew up and now i know i should constantly be improving myself SO A BIG THANKYOU ❤️
